column1: 忙しくてろくに眠れていない。
column2: いそがしくてろくにねむれていない。
column3: I'm so busy I can't even get a proper sleep.
column6: indicates one cannot even do X to a minimally adequate level
column8: ろくに + ない = can't even do the minimum; stronger inadequacy than あまり〜ない
column10: module:04-n2 jlpt:n2 point:陸に-ない complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored

column1: 緊張してろくに話せなかった。
column2: きんちょうしてろくにはなせなかった。
column3: I was so nervous I couldn't even speak properly.
column6: inability to reach a basic standard due to an impairing condition
column8: ろくに implies the person couldn't meet a commonly expected baseline
column10: module:04-n2 jlpt:n2 point:陸に-ない complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top10k

column1: 昨日はろくに食事もできなかった。
column2: きのうはろくにしょくじもできなかった。
column3: Yesterday I couldn't even eat a proper meal.
column5: ろくに + N + も + V-ない
column6: も adds emphasis: couldn't even manage N
column8: ろくに〜も〜ない = emphatic: couldn't even achieve X
column10: module:04-n2 jlpt:n2 point:陸に-ない complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored

column1: 子供の頃はろくに勉強しなかった。
column2: こどものころはろくにべんきょうしなかった。
column3: When I was a child I didn't study properly.
column4: ろくに〜しなかった (past inadequacy)
column5: ろくに + V-しなかった
column6: reflects on past failure to meet an adequate standard
column8: ろくに can combine with past tense to describe habitual past inadequacy
column10: module:04-n2 jlpt:n2 point:陸に-ない complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top1k

column1: 仕事が忙しくてろくに家族と話す時間がない。
column2: しごとがいそがしくてろくにかぞくとはなすじかんがない。
column3: Work is so busy I don't even have time to properly talk to my family.
column5: ろくに + N + が + ない
column6: inadequacy in time or resources for basic human needs
column8: ろくに often signals work-life imbalance or extreme busyness
column10: module:04-n2 jlpt:n2 point:陸に-ない complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top1k
